degree.zh: 车载智能线控制动产品研发

bullets.zh: 参与车载线控制动执行器控制策略开发，基于Simulink/Stateflow搭建电机多闭环控制逻辑，覆盖位置环、速度环、转矩/电流环等模块，并参与模型仿真、代码集成与台架调试。
bullets.en: Participated in the development of control strategies for automotive brake-by-wire actuators, building multi-loop motor control logic in Simulink/Stateflow, covering position, speed, and torque/current loops; involved in model simulation, code integration, and bench testing.

bullets.zh: 负责线控制动主/备控制板及 CAN A/B 路冗余切换逻辑，设计故障判定、状态机跳转、降级保护与恢复条件，并完成控制单板冒烟测试及 EMC 相关验证。
bullets.en: Developed redundant switchover logic for primary/backup brake-by-wire control boards and CAN A/B channels, including fault detection, state transitions, degraded-mode protection, recovery conditions, board smoke tests, and EMC-related validation.

bullets.zh: 独立完成 T-F 数据标定与曲线拟合，开发自动化标定程序，将单卡钳标定时间压缩至 15 秒以内；使用 CANape、Lauterbach 完成变量观测、内存映射、底层代码追踪与总线诊断。
bullets.en: Independently completed T-F data calibration and curve fitting, creating an automated workflow that reduced single-caliper calibration time to under 15 seconds; used CANape and Lauterbach for measurement, memory mapping, low-level tracing, and bus diagnostics.

school.zh: 经纬恒润科技股份有限公司

bullets.zh: 参与智能座舱大模型及感知系统开发，主导基于摄像头的驾驶员生理指标（血氧浓度、呼吸频率、心率）非接触式视觉感知算法研究。
bullets.en: Contributed to intelligent-cockpit LLM and perception system development; led research on a camera-based, contactless vision algorithm for driver physiological indicators (SpO₂, respiratory rate, heart rate).

bullets.zh: 完成 PyTorch 模型向高通 8255 车规级芯片的端侧部署与适配，实现座舱内实时生理体征监测。
bullets.en: Deployed and adapted a PyTorch model onto the Qualcomm 8255 automotive-grade chip for on-device, real-time in-cabin vital-sign monitoring.

degree.zh: 智能算法技术研究岗助理

bullets.zh: 参与工业智能算法项目，利用深度学习网络对轴承、齿轮等零部件进行异常检测，研究并对比 Transformer、PatchTST、DLinear、MICN 等多种时序模型，构建故障诊断路由模型。
bullets.en: Worked on an industrial intelligent-algorithm project, using deep networks to detect anomalies in bearings, gears, and other components; benchmarked time-series models including Transformer, PatchTST, DLinear, and MICN, and built a fault-diagnosis routing model.

bullets.zh: 负责交通设备零部件数据集处理与训练，承担深度学习算法调优、API 接口修改及大规模训练数据处理等工作。
bullets.en: Owned dataset processing and training for transit-equipment components, handling deep-learning model tuning, API modifications, and large-scale training-data pipelines.
